name: mayekama
description: MayekAma Build 6 of 6: release candidate with locked UI, website/language engine, Android keyboard alpha source, Supabase/API release schema, SEO files, and final handover documentation.

scripts.lint: echo "Lint placeholder: add ESLint in Build 2"
scripts.build:all: npm run check && npm run build && npm run validate:pack && npm run test:engine
scripts.build5:check: npm run check && npm run validate:pack && npm run test:engine && npm run android:status
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run validate:pack && npm run test:engine && npm run android:status && node scripts/release-report.mjs
